corrections_by_claim.note: Correctly identified as illustrative. The state's role in securing mineral supply chains for AI is a classic example of the 'constitutive role' of the state in tech, but as a diplomatic observer status, it is a weak empirical data point.
Correctly identified as illustrative. The link between high-tech AI/EV industries and the extraction of lithium/copper from the Global South directly maps to the expropriation/core-periphery dynamic.
Correctly identified as illustrative. It shows the continuity of capitalist resource-seeking behavior in the 'new' economy.
